message.content:
@startuml
participant as sysAdmin as "sysAdmin"
participant as maintainUsersWindow as "边界类 maintainUsersWindow"
participant as MaintainUsers as "控制类 MaintainUsers"
participant as users as "users"
participant as databaseStorage as "数据库存储"

sysAdmin ..> maintainUsersWindow : 删除用户
maintainUsersWindow ..> MaintainUsers : 删除用户请求
MaintainUsers ..> users : 确认删除的用户信息
users ..> databaseStorage : 数据库存储实验数据
databaseStorage ..> maintainUsersWindow : 根据系统管理员删除的用户信息返回数据
maintainUsersWindow ..> sysAdmin : 退出请求
sysAdmin ..> maintainUsersWindow : 保存退出

@enduml
